title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLII. Games.
content:
1. This pig went to the barn.
        2. This eat all the corn.
        3. This said he would tell.
        4. This said he wasn't well.
        5. This went week, week, week, over the door sill.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
